question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/MonitorApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged user supply --spring.main.web-application-type=NONE via args to SpringApplication.run(), disabling the web server so that health check endpoints become unreachable, masking a compromised or misconfigured monitor from operators?
